final:
// // This module implements a 4-bit EEPROM cell with a write disable (WD) and a read disable (RD). Writing to the cell occurs on a negative edge of WD, and reading from the cell occurs on a negative edge of RD.
module eeprom_cell (
    input clk,
    input WE,
    input RE,
    input [3:0] D,
    output reg [3:0] Q
);
    reg [3:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (WE) begin
            memory <= D; // Write data to memory
        end
        if (RE) begin
            Q <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 4-bit EEPROM cell with a write disable (WD) and a read disable (RD). Writing to the cell occurs on a negative edge of WD, and reading from the cell occurs on a negative edge of RD.
